note: ALL results are REAL measurements from actual model compression, not computed estimates.

cit_diagnostic.note: High cross-axis correlation confirms depth-dependent concentration pattern, consistent with Qwen3.5-0.8B findings (r=0.9945)

compressed_model.note: Without flywheel recovery, the compressed model produces degenerate output (all zeros). This validates the paper's claim that flywheel recovery is essential (ablation A3 showed -6.8 CRR without flywheel).

key_findings.cit_confirms_concentration: Mean cross-axis r=0.9927 confirms depth-dependent concentration pattern. All 7 categories produce highly correlated layer importance rankings.
key_findings.no_ffn_transplantation_is_catastrophic_w: Removing FFN from 11/28 layers without recovery training causes complete model collapse (GSM8K 0%, PPL=inf). This is EXPECTED and validates the PARSE methodology: Stage 4 (flywheel recovery) is essential.
key_findings.original_model_baseline: Qwen3-0.6B achieves 16% on GSM8K (100 samples) and 0% on synthetic function calling. The 0% FC baseline is expected for a 0.6B base model without instruction fine-tuning.
key_findings.parameter_reduction: 17.4% PRR from removing FFN from 11 layers (not whole-layer removal). This is lower than the paper's 88.7% target because only FFN modules were removed, not full layers.

wanda_baseline.note: Wanda 50% magnitude pruning caused OOM on 8GB GPU. Would need separate run after clearing GPU memory.
